headline: Your testosterone is normal but you feel like garbage
Ever been told your testosterone is "normal," but you still feel off? Normal doesn’t mean optimal
body: Testosterone levels are are specific to each individual normal range is not optimal

headline: I’ve been there
body: My labs looked fine, but my energy, mood, and performance told a different story. Turns out you need to find the optimal range for you and follow your gut if you don't feel right keep looking for answers

headline: That's the main reason I developed this App
body: Load your wearable data, blood work, supplements and other health related details. Then Get AI insights and suggestions. It identified my issue.

headline: It Identified that the reason I was feeling less energy and less strength
body: Because of donating Blood frequently to keep hemocrit in check I became Iron deficient Once AI pointed it out it was clear it was on the labs clear as day they had missed it completely. Ferratin levels basically zero

headline: I've been supplementing Iron Biglycinate and Vitamin "C" a little over a month
body: Add Felt this best today that i have in a few years!
